operation.command: du -sh /* 2>/dev/null | sort -rh | head -10; echo "---"; df -h / | awk 'NR==2{print "总空间: "$2, "已用: "$3, "可用: "$4, "使用率: "$5}'

risk.reason: LLM assessed: This command performs read-only disk usage and filesystem space queries. It does not modify any files or system state.
risk.llm_reason: This command performs read-only disk usage and filesystem space queries. It does not modify any files or system state.
